heading: Multifamily special affordable housing goal
label: 4563 Multifamily special affordable housing goal
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4563, , , , related to special affordable housing goal, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 102–550, title XIII, § 1333106 Stat. 3958Pub. L. 110–289, div. A, title I, § 1128(a)122 Stat. 2696Oct. 28, 1992July 30, 2008
amendments: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4563, , , , related to special affordable housing goal, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 102–550, title XIII, § 1333106 Stat. 3958Pub. L. 110–289, div. A, title I, § 1128(a)122 Stat. 2696Oct. 28, 1992July 30, 2008

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Director shall, by regulation, establish a single annual goal, by either unit or dollar volume, of purchases by each enterprise of mortgages on multifamily housing that finance dwelling units affordable to low-income families.

children.heading: Additional requirements for units affordable to very low-income families
children.label: 2 Additional requirements for units affordable to very low-income families
children.text: When establishing the goal under this section, the Director shall establish additional requirements for the purchase by each enterprise of mortgages on multifamily housing that finance dwelling units affordable to very low-income families.

children.heading: Reporting on smaller properties
children.label: 3 Reporting on smaller properties
children.text: The Director shall require each enterprise to report on the purchase by each enterprise of multifamily housing of a smaller or limited size that is affordable to low-income families, which may be based on multifamily projects of 5 to 50 units (as such numbers may be adjusted by the Director) or on mortgages of up to $5,000,000 (as such amount may be adjusted by the Director), and may, by regulation, establish such aditional requirements related to such units.1So in original.1

children.label: A
children.text: national multifamily mortgage credit needs and the ability of the enterprise to provide additional liquidity and stability for the multifamily mortgage market;

children.label: B
children.text: the performance and effort of the enterprise in making mortgage credit available for multifamily housing in previous years;

children.label: C
children.text: the size of the multifamily mortgage market for housing affordable to low-income and very low-income families, including the size of the multifamily markets for housing of a smaller or limited size;

children.label: D
children.text: the ability of the enterprise to lead the market in making multifamily mortgage credit available, especially for multifamily housing described in paragraphs (1) and (2);

children.label: E
children.text: the availability of public subsidies; and

children.label: F
children.text: the need to maintain the sound financial condition of the enterprise.

children.heading: Units financed by housing finance agency bonds
children.label: b Units financed by housing finance agency bonds

children.text: are secured by a guarantee of the enterprise; or

are purchased by the enterprise, except that the Director may give less than full credit for purchases of investment grade bonds, to the extent that such purchases do not provide a new market or add liquidity to an existing market.

children.heading: Measurement of performance
children.label: c Measurement of performance
children.text: The Director shall monitor the performance of each enterprise in meeting the goals established under this section and shall evaluate such performance (for purposes of ) based on whether the rent levels are affordable. A rent level shall be considered to be affordable for purposes of this subsection for low-income families if it does not exceed 30 percent of the maximum income level of such income category, with appropriate adjustments for unit size as measured by the number of bedrooms.section 4566 of this title

children.heading: Determination of compliance
children.label: d Determination of compliance
children.text: The Director shall determine, for each year that the housing goal under this section is in effect pursuant to , whether each enterprise has complied with such goal and the additional requirements under subsection (a)(2).section 4561(a) of this title
